core_principle.statement: UI components are modular engineering units, not visual design elements.
core_principle.interpretation: Every component must behave like a functional part of an architectural engineering system.

system_architecture.structure_logic: Design System → Components → Modules → Pages → System Output
system_architecture.principle: All UI elements must be built from reusable engineering components

component_fundamentals.modularity: Each component is a standalone engineering unit
component_fundamentals.consistency: All components follow shared grid, color, and typography systems
component_fundamentals.predictability: Components must behave identically across all contexts
component_fundamentals.scalability: Components must work across web, mobile, and documentation systems

core_components.name: Button System
core_components.behavior: Represents system action and transformation trigger

container.rule: Defines structural boundaries of system content

divider.rule: Engineering separation line, not decorative element

state_system.rule: States must remain functional, not decorative

animation_rules.principle: Motion must reflect system logic, not aesthetics

user_perception: This is a controlled engineering system
This behaves like an architectural framework

strategic_goal.objective: Ensure UI is perceived as an engineering system, not a visual design
strategic_goal.outcome: Consistent modular architecture across all digital interfaces
